local TARGET_PLACEID = 119538320626412

-- ==================== WHITELIST (Duyệt người dùng) ====================
local Whitelist = {
    "concubi99",          -- Thay bằng tên của bạn
    "utrir8",
    "TenNguoiThu3",
    -- Thêm tên người được phép dùng vào đây, mỗi tên cách nhau bằng dấu phẩy
}

local function IsWhitelisted(username)
    for _, name in ipairs(Whitelist) do
        if name == username then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end

-- ==================== KIỂM TRA PLACEID TRƯỚC ====================
if game.PlaceId ~= TARGET_PLACEID then
    warn("Script chỉ hoạt động ở PlaceId: " .. TARGET_PLACEID)
    return
end

-- ==================== KIỂM TRA WHITELIST ====================
local LocalPlayer = game.Players.LocalPlayer

if not IsWhitelisted(LocalPlayer.Name) then
    OrionLib = loadstring(game:HttpGet("https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tanloczx/Shadow-Hubvn/refs/heads/main/Orion.lua.txt"))()
-- Load tạm để hiện notify
    
    OrionLib:MakeNotification({
        Name = "WHITELIST",
        Content = "Bạn không có trong danh sách duyệt!\nBú cái lon 👅",
        Time = 10
    })
    
    task.wait(3)
    return  -- Dừng hoàn toàn script, không hiện Orion UI
end

print("✅ Whitelist Passed | User: " .. LocalPlayer.Name .. " → Đang load Orion...")

\061\061","\049\120\053\108\070\105\110\113\050\069\053\097\057\052\070\089\084\065\061\061","\066\105\076\122\087\048\055\072"}local function N(N)return v[N+(1019839-974484)]end for N,C in ipairs({{93023+-93022;-728526+729085},{837557+-837556,504841-504557},{-1036896-(-1037181);119513-118954}})do while C[154866+-154865]<C[-58597+58599]do v[C[-659285+659286]],v[C[759828+-759826]],C[355030-355029],C[753106+-753104]=v[C[-504324-(-504326)]],v[C[-969556-(-969557)]],C[52404-52403]+(992074-992073),C[1006012-1006010]-(457082-457081)end end do local N={["\052"]=-831523-(-831527),["\056"]=333960-333954,["\047"]=499577+-499563,["\049"]=-395840-(-395867),z=642245-642199,k=380308+-380284,K=81778-81718,P=968534+-968526,O=421037-421002;["\054"]=359750-359749;L=-888464-(-888477),w=595408-595355,q=-509401+509417;H=94183+-94133;W=896621-896611,Z=328692-328673,u=-324123-(-324161);j=-373660-(-373711);S=-1044599-(-1044640),F=70366-70341;n=814782+-814773,d=-176544-(-176577),D=-228065+228126,["\050"]=-580601-(-580629);v=883921+-883858;h=94952-94932;c=1037595-1037565,["\057"]=528214-528202;s=-535732-(-535754);N=588462+-588403;m=-974990-(-975024),r=-56392-(-56434),e=450842+-450824,Q=927393+-927388,I=706913+-706857,["\043"]=-551975-(-552006),i=968679-968672;l=810509+-810494;o=-838201+838222,f=-1044671-(-1044707),b=822655-822593,a=-817057+817060,p=784660-784637,["\053"]=18117-18080,G=692582+-692571,["\055"]=647967+-647919;M=-255844-(-255861),["\048"]=-271975+272015;J=578646-578617;X=506194-506147;x=434062+-434023;g=438527+-438469;t=-382477+382520,Y=218764+-218707,y=-263761-(-263810),E=-80977+81032;A=151453+-151453;B=-572632+572686,T=614512-614486,V=-519545+519547;["\051"]=-110672-(-110704);U=480688-480636,R=-412827-(-412872);C=-1040124-(-1040168)}local C=string.sub local Y=table.concat local l=table.insert local F=string.len local D=string.char local X=v local T=math.floor local A=type for v=-884953+884954,#X,761377-761376 do local m=X[v]if A(m)=="\115\116\114\105\110\103"then local A=F(m)local w={}local K=-571652-(-571653)local J=-687331+687331 local r=-435096-(-435096)while K<=A do local v=C(m,K,K)local Y=N[v]if Y then J=J+Y*(702013+-701949)^((680479+-680476)-r)r=r+(-692332-(-692333))if r==202501+-202497 then r=-524406+524406 local v=T(J/(-80764+146300))local N=T((J%(702489-636953))/(87535-87279))local C=J%(-202745+203001)l(w,D(v,N,C))J=234219-234219 end elseif v=="\061"then l(w,D(T(J/(-411153+476689))))if K>=A or C(m,K+(1024982-1024981),K+(-983501+983502))~="\061"then return(function(v,Y,l,F,D,X,T,w,j,A,f,q,u,z,J,V,m,C,c,r,e,S,K)r,q,c,u,m,e,K,S,w,z,A,f,j,J,C,V=function(v)local N,C=771442+-771441,v[-593709-(-593710)]while C do C(v,{l,F},N,Y)end return l end return(e(9827239-(-684138),{}))(Y(T))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[N(649827-695013)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
